column2: #Conduct the t-test of concentration-fuel_type (Use the rstatix package)
filter(group != "Baseline") %>% #To create the statistical significance only between Control and Intervention
add_significance(cutpoints = c(0, 0.05, 1), symbols = c("**", "ns")) #to add the significance values
add_x_position(x= "species", dodge = 0.5) %>% #x position is species, and the length of significance bar is 0.5
add_y_position(y.trans = function(x){log10(x)}) #add y position, in this case specify using a function that it is in log base 10 scale
